sessions.summary: Won Level 12 league championship (3-0 vs Cholargos) and association tournament. Assigned x40 coach to T. Malka (DMC, 106 OVR). Decided formation change to 2-2-1-3-2 for Level 13. Sold dead weight players. Geva (DR, 83) promoted to starter. Ran LLM Council twice for investment decision.
next_steps: Feed Duek for Top Scorer next season
